name: Lime Squares # 2
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Mix flour, margarine and powdered sugar. Press into an ungreased baking pan, 8x8x2 inches or 9x9x2 inches, building up 1/2 inch edges. Bake for 20 minutes. Beat remaining ingredients until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes; pour over baked layer. Bake until no indentation remains when touched in the center, about 25 minutes. Cool. Sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired. Cut into 1-inch squares.
